scripts.build: pnpm --filter @design-bridge/core build && pnpm --filter @design-bridge/components build && pnpm --filter @design-bridge/client build && pnpm --filter @design-bridge/vite-plugin build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @design-bridge/components test && pnpm --filter @design-bridge/server test && pnpm --filter @design-bridge/client test && pnpm --filter @design-bridge/vite-plugin test
